search_parameters.q: best grocery stores in Portland, OR

search_information.query_displayed: best grocery stores in Portland, OR

local_results.title: Market of Choice Belmont
local_results.description: Source for groceries, deli fare & more. Market with a standard selection of groceries plus on-site kitchens with sandwiches & prepared food.

local_results.title: Zupan's Markets - Burnside
local_results.description: Venerable source for gourmet groceries. This long-running, family-owned chain carries upmarket grocery items, meat, flowers & wine.
local_results.user_review: "Produce is beautiful, deli food delicious and excellent customer service."

local_results.title: World Foods
local_results.description: Fresh produce, hot meals and a cafe make up this long-standing market.
local_results.user_review: "They always have the freshest fruits and veggies."

local_results.title: New Seasons Market
local_results.description: Groceries, home goods & wellness items. This grocery supplier with many locally sourced items also sells home goods & wellness products.
local_results.user_review: "The quality and variety of produce, meats, fowl, and fish are excellent."

local_results.title: Whole Foods Market
local_results.description: Mainstay for natural & organic food. Eco-minded chain with natural & organic grocery items, housewares & other products (most sell wine).

local_results.title: Trader Joe's
local_results.description: Specialty grocer with housebrand items. Grocery chain with a variety of signature items, plus produce, dairy & more (most sell wine & beer).

local_results.title: Providore Fine Foods
local_results.description: Upscale gourmet grocer & food hall. Trendy culinary marketplace with casual seating, gourmet groceries & New American dishes.
local_results.user_review: "Great selection of harder to find grocery items and upscale staples."

local_results.title: New Seasons Market
local_results.description: Groceries, home goods & wellness items. This grocery supplier with many locally sourced items also sells home goods & wellness products.

local_results.title: Market of Choice Cedar Mill
local_results.address: 250 NW Lost Springs Terrace, Portland, OR 97229
local_results.description: Source for groceries, deli fare & more. Market with a standard selection of groceries plus on-site kitchens with sandwiches & prepared food.

local_results.title: Trader Joe's
local_results.description: Specialty grocer with housebrand items. Grocery chain with a variety of signature items, plus produce, dairy & more (most sell wine & beer).
local_results.user_review: "Great produce, great price, friendly staff, love the samples."

local_results.title: Fred Meyer
local_results.description: Groceries, apparel & housewares chain. Longtime retail chain for groceries, apparel & furniture, plus toys, electronics, housewares & more.

local_results.title: People's Food Co-op
local_results.description: Emporium for locavores & organic goods. Grocer offering local, organic & sustainable food items plus an on-site, year-round farmer's market.

local_results.title: New Seasons Market
local_results.description: Groceries, home goods & wellness items. This grocery supplier with many locally sourced items also sells home goods & wellness products.
local_results.user_review: "Large selection, good quality produce, very friendly."

local_results.title: Barbur World Foods
local_results.description: International groceries & a gourmet deli. This specialty market with a Middle Eastern focus offers many imported products, plus meat & a deli.
local_results.user_review: "Consistently decent prices on meats and produce with good quality."

local_results.title: New Seasons Market
local_results.description: Groceries, home goods & wellness items. This grocery supplier with many locally sourced items also sells home goods & wellness products.

local_results.title: La Bouffe International Gourmet
local_results.description: Laid-back gourmet grocer selling olive oils, cheeses, spices and ethnic foods, plus bulk staples.
local_results.user_review: "Clean and well stocked with some rare items."

local_results.title: Fred Meyer
local_results.description: Groceries, apparel & housewares chain. Longtime retail chain for groceries, apparel & furniture, plus toys, electronics, housewares & more.
local_results.user_review: "Fresh produce like always and great deals especially the weekly ad!"

local_results.title: Wellspent Market
local_results.description: Gourmet food store and specialty food store, featuring local products and wine, along with pizza-making kits.
local_results.user_review: "Very clean and well stocked shop with exotic and unique foods."
